{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184352FD54668147B2F5BA4552"}"},"total":4},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605927147715429144","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说是我喜欢的类型，超喜欢😍"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770895814,"group_id":"7601510809188977726","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4qQXvlR23oNKRuOIfyPHtI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"110420657451928","user_name":"爱吃派皮的青灵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110420657451928","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601510809188977726","book_info":{"abstract":"【架空➕科举➕朝堂➕无cp➕前期种田】
知识是锁，权势是墙，寒门子弟永远徘徊在围墙之外。
直到陈青禾的到来。
凭借超越时代的学识，从县试案首到金殿状元，他走的每一步，都在撕裂世家编织的天罗地网。
入东宫，于夺嫡漩涡中定鼎国本。
居首辅，以“官绅一体纳粮”向千年特权斩下历史性的一刀。
更立格致院，引“青禾学说”成天下显学。
面对千年未变之格局，陈青禾执笔为剑：“我要的，不仅是状元冠冕，更是要为我身后万千寒门，开一条万世不易的向上之路”
「这天下，不该只是世家的棋盘。」
「教育、军政、海权——这场跨越阶层的战争，我全都要赢。」
以一人之智，破千年之局；携众生之力，开万世之途。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/fa4e833a8ec031dc23239c59d5983977~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"青梧摇钱","author_id":"","book_id":"7601510809188977726","book_name":"朱笔定青云：寒门科举路","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3485人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7601975304633975321","read_count":"3485","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"168730"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"82","tags":"历史古代,历史,架空,穿越,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fa4e833a8ec031dc23239c59d5983977~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446632&x-signature=PjHHJo1%2BckOb3XM0LWF2x3WdZe8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"351486584067384","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184352FD54668147B2F5BA4552"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1786,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7699,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":316},"user_action":{"author":0
